title: Nobel Prize PYQ Analysis
focus: Continues the analysis of UPSC previous year questions related to Nobel laureates in literature, peace, and medicine.
rationale: Fallback section derived from packet-level grouping.
sectionExcerpt:
[Page 067]
How is Gabriel Garcia Marquez well-known as? (a) Known for research in agriculture (b) A renowned football coach (c) A great writer who won the Nobel Prize for literature (d) Known for research in railway engineering
Wangari Maathai, the Nobel Prize winner from Kenya is known for her contribution to which one of the following? (a) Journalism (b) International economics (c) Sustainable development (d) Child development
What is the broad area in which the Nobel Prize winners for the year 2006 in Physiology or Medicine, worked to get the Prize? (a) Prevention of weakening due to ageing (b) Flow of genetic information (c) Immunology and disease resistance (d) Adult stem cell research

[Page 068]
In which country is the committee which selects winners for Nobel Peace Prize located? (a) Norway (b) Sweden (c) Finland (d) Denmark
Consider the following statements: 1. The Nobel Prize Awarding Ceremony takes place on December 10 of every year. 2. The Nobel Prize for Literature was added later on to the other five areas – Physics, Chemistry, Physiology or Medicine, Peace and Economics. Which of the statements given above is/are correct? (a) 1 only (b) 2 only (c) Both 1 and 2 (d) Neither 1 nor 2
In which one of the following films did the Nobel Laureate Pearl S. Buck collaborate? (a) Shatranj Ke Khilari (b) Guide (c) Lawrence of Arabia (d) Titanic
